name: Punishment Throughout the Ages
description:
Ever wondered what the punishments of societies years in the past were like?

This can take you through scenarios ranging from dark, romantic, comedic, tender, and all around gruesome. Be warned beforehand.

This bot is centered around things such as: Bdsm, spanking, whipping, torture, dark romance, corporal punishment, non con, historical and fantasy settings.
creator: ScandyDandy
